title.ko: 채광(採鑛) 또는 채석(採石)
title.en: MINING OR QUARRYING

definition.ko: 깍아내기; 슬리팅(slitting); 파내기 기계(機械)의 일반적 구조 E21C25/00, E21C27/00 세부(細部) E21C29/00, E21C31/00, E21C35/00 기타장치 E21C33/00, E21C37/00, E21C39/00 채광(採鑛), 채석(採石)의 방법; 노천채굴(露天採掘) E21C41/00, E21C45/00, E21C47/00, E21C49/00 수중으로부터의 광물(鑛物) 채취(採取) E21C50/00 지구대기권 밖으로부터의 자원 획득 E21C51/00

title.ko: 절단기(切斷機), 즉 층(層)에 대하여 대략 평행 또는 직각인 이음매를 넣기 위한 것(슬릿을 넣는 장치를 가지는 파내는 기계 27/02, 27/10, 27/18)
title.en: Cutting; Slitting; Dislodging

title.ko: 절단기(切斷機), 즉 층(層)에 대하여 대략 평행 또는 직각인 이음매를 넣기 위한 것(슬릿을 넣는 장치를 가지는 파내는 기계 27/02, 27/10, 27/18)
title.en: Cutting machines, i.e. for making slits approximately parallel or perpendicular to the seam (dislodging machines with slitting means E21C0027020000, E21C0027100000, E21C0027180000)

title.ko: 층내(層內)를 움직이는 하나 또는 그 이상의 충격(衝擊) 공구에 의하여 이음매 파기를 하는 기계
title.en: Machines slitting solely by one or more percussive tools moved through the seam

title.ko: 커팅 크라운 또는 기타 공구(충격(衝擊) 드릴 비트 E21B 10/36)
title.en: Cutting crowns or other tools (percussion drill bits E21B0010360000)

title.ko: 층내(層內)를 움직이며 회전하고 또한 왕복 운동을 해도 안해도 좋은 하나 또는 그 이상의 커팅 로드(rod) 또는 커팅 드럼에 의하여 이음매 파기를 하는 기계
title.en: Machines slitting solely by one or more cutting rods or cutting drums which rotate, move through the seam, and may or may not reciprocate
Mountings for the rods or drums
Rods; Drums

title.ko: 슬릿 청소 용구를 갖는 것(커터 체인 장치에 부가한 것 25/50)
title.en: with equipment for cleaning the slit (associated with cutter chain machines E21C0025500000)
Machines slitting solely by one or more rotating saws, cutting discs, or wheels
Saws; Discs; Wheels
Machines slitting solely by one or more reciprocating sawing implements or reciprocating cutter chains; Shaker conveyors with cutting means

title.ko: 지브(jib) 에 따라서 일방향으로 움직이는 하나 또는 그 이상의 커터 체인에 의하여 슬릿만 파는 기계
title.en: Machines slitting solely by one or more cutter chains moving unidirectionally along jibs
with flat jibs only
with curved jibs only
Chains or chain guides
Chain guides
specially adapted for curved jibs
Chains
Couplings for links
having links with integrally formed picks

title.ko: 슬릿의 청소 장비를 갖는 것(회전 로드(rod) 또는 회전 드럼에 부가한 것 25/14)
title.en: with equipment for cleaning the slit (associated with rotary-rod or rotary-drum machines E21C0025140000)
Machines incorporating two or more of the slitting means according to groups E21C0025020000, E21C0025060000, E21C0025160000, E21C0025200000 and E21C0025220000

title.ko: 안내되지 않는 커터 테이블 또는 커터 체인에 의한 슬릿 또는 케이블 또는 그것과 같은 종류의 것에 의하여 작업면에 따라서 끌여당겨지는 안내되지 않는 공구에 의한 슬릿(평삭(平削)에 의한 파내기 27/32, 인장 케이블에 의한 추진 29/14)
title.en: Slitting by unguided cutter cables or cutter chains or by unguided tools drawn along the working face by cables or the like (dislodging by planing means E21C0027320000;propulsion by haulage cables E21C0029140000)

title.ko: 커터 테이블 또는 커터 체인에 의한 슬릿 또는 케이블 또는 그것과 같은 종류의 것에 의하여 작업면에 따라서 끌리는 공구에 의한 슬릿. 어느 경우도 작업면에 평행으로 안내되는 것, 예. 콘베이어에 의한 것, 콘베이어에 평행인 가이드에 의한 것(작업면측에 공구를 장비한 콘베이어를 밀어붙이는 것 35/14)
title.en: Slitting by cutter cables or cutter chains or by tools drawn along the working face by cables or the like, in each case guided parallel to the face, e.g. by a conveyor or by a guide parallel to a conveyor (pressing the conveyor equipped with tools toward the working face E21C0035140000)
Machines slitting by drilling hole on hole

title.ko: 물의 분사(噴射) 또는 다른 액체의 분사에 의한 슬릿(액체 분사(噴射) 노즐의 장치에 의한 픽 (picks) 35/187; 회전커터해드 내에 분사(噴射) 액체의 분배 35/23)
title.en: Slitting by jets of water or other liquid (picks with arrangement of fluid-spraying nozzles E21C0035187000;distribution of spraying fluids in rotating cutter-heads E21C0035230000)
Machines for making slits approximately perpendicular to the seams either level with, or above or below the level of, the machine

title.ko: 손에 의하여 또는 손과 지지체(支持體)의 어느 한 쪽에 의하여 가이드 되는 슬릿 기기(수지(手持) 동력 구동 장치 37/22)
title.en: Slitting machines guided solely by hand and either carried by hand or mounted on supports (hand-held power-operated tools E21C0037220000)
Machines for making slits with additional arrangements for drilling

title.ko: 다른 수단에 의하여 얻어지는 것의 이동, 예. 적재(積載)에 의한 장치를 구비한 슬릿 기계(호벨(planing means)을 구비한 것 27/18; 칩(chip)의 제거 35/20)
title.en: Machines for making slits combined with equipment for removing, e.g. by loading, material won by other means (slitting machines combined with planing means E21C0027180000;removing chippings E21C0035200000)

title.ko: 이음매에서 광물(鑛物)을 완전히 파내는 기계
title.en: Machines which completely free the mineral from the seam
specially adapted for removing overhanging coal

title.ko: 슬릿에 의한 것(로드(rod), 드럼 25/10; 톱, 디스크, 휠(wheel) 25/18; 체인, 체인 가이드 25/28)
title.en: solely by slitting (rods, drums, for same E21C0025100000;saws, discs, wheels E21C0025180000;chains, chain guides, for same E21C0025280000)
by a single chain guided on a frame with or without auxiliary slitting means
with a slewing frame
with additional means for cutting the mineral into blocks

title.ko: 슬릿팅(slitting)과 파쇄(破碎)를 같이 쓰는 것
title.en: by both slitting and breaking-down
breaking-down effected by acting on the vertical face of the mineral, e.g. by percussive tools

title.ko: 슬릿 측면에 힘 또는 압력을 가함으로써 효과적으로 파쇄(破碎)하는것 예. 쐐기에 의한 것(구멍에 삽입하여 파쇄(破碎)하는 것 37/00)
title.en: breaking-down effected by force or pressure applied to side of slit, e.g. by wedges (breaking-down by means inserted in boreholes E21C0037000000)
with means for both slitting and breaking-down
by both slitting and planing

title.ko: 회전(回轉) 슬릿팅에 의하지 않는 광물(鑛物)의 파내기
title.en: Mineral freed by means not involving slitting
by rotary drills with breaking-down means, e.g. wedge-shaped drills
by milling means acting on the full working face
by closely adjacent cutter chains acting on the full working face
by percussive drills with breaking-down means, e.g. wedge-shaped tools
by jaws, buckets, or scoops that scoop-out the mineral

title.ko: 적재(積載) 장치를 구비하거나 또는 구비하지 않고 조절(調節)할 수 있거나 또는 할 수 없는 평삭 (平削)에 의한 것(충격식 평삭(平削) 27/46)
title.en: by adjustable or non-adjustable planing means with or without loading arrangements (by percussed planing means E21C0027460000)
Machine propelled along the working face by cable or chain
Ram-ploughs
Machine self-propelled along the working face
Machine stationary while planing in an arc
Machine and its planing tool making alternative step-wise movements along the working face
combined with scraper or collector box

title.ko: 평삭용(平削用) 나이프(광산(鑛山) 픽(pick) 35/18)
title.en: Planing knives (mining picks E21C0035180000)
by percussed planing means

title.ko: 슬릿 기계 또는 이음매에서 광물을 완전히 파내는 기계의 추진(推進)
title.en: Propulsion of machines for slitting or completely freeing the mineral from the seam
by means on the machine exerting a thrust against fixed supports

title.ko: 케이블 또는 체인에 의한 것
title.en: by cable or chains

title.ko: 작업면에 한쪽 끝 또는 양끝을 파묻는 것
title.en: anchored at one or both ends to the mine working face

title.ko: 고정구(콘베이어만의 고정구 E21F 13/00)
title.en: Anchoring arrangements (for anchoring of conveyors only E21F0013000000)
Cable or chain co-operating with a winch or the like on the machine
Machines propelled by thrust or pull against a part alternately anchored to, and released from, a cable or chain

title.ko: 견인(牽引) 케이블 또는 체인에 의하여 기계를 작업면에 따라서 끌어당기는 것
title.en: by haulage cable or chain pulling the machine along the working face

title.ko: 케이블 또는 체인을 끌어당기는 윈치 또는 그 수단(윈치(winch) 그 자체 B66D)
title.en: Winches or other means for pulling cable or chain (winches in general B66D)
Coupling and uncoupling machine to cable or chain
with safety devices operating in the event of breakage of the cable or chain
by wheels, endless tracks, or the like
Trucks carrying the machine while working
with means for adjustably positioning the machine on the truck
adjusting the height of the whole machine
Driving means incorporated in machines for slitting or completely freeing the mineral from the seam
for cutting or breaking-down devices
imparting both a rotary and reciprocating motion
actuated by an endless cable or chain
for adjusting parts of the machines
for slewing parts of the machines
Component parts
Trucks or other devices for transporting machines for slitting or completely freeing the mineral from the seam
with equipment for loading or unloading the machine on to, or from, the truck

title.ko: 그룹 E21C 25/00 - E21C 33/00, E21C 37/00, E21C 39/00 으로 분류되지 않는, 슬릿 기계와 층(경계선)에서 광물을 파내는 기계의 세부, 그것을 위한 부속품
title.en: Details of, or accessories for, machines for slitting or completely freeing the mineral from the seam, not provided for in groups E21C0025000000-E21C0033000000, E21C0037000000 or E21C0039000000
Locking equipment for slewable parts

title.ko: 안전 장치(견인용 케이블 또는 체인의 파괴발생에 작동되는 것 E21C 29/20)
title.en: Safety devices (operating in the event of breakage of a haulage cable or chain E21C0029200000)
Equipment for positioning the whole machine in relation to its sub-structure
Guiding the machine
by feelers contacting the working face
along a conveyor for the cut material
Equipment for pressing the conveyor towards the working face
by making use of the timbering, filling, or other supports

title.ko: 광물 곡괭이(pick); 홀더 등(평삭용 나이프 E21C 27/44)
title.en: Mining picks; Holders therefor (planing knives E21C0027440000)
with inserts or layers of wear-resisting material

title.ko: 유체 분사(噴射) 노즐의 배치에 의한 것(노즐에서 유체의 공급 E21C 35/22)
title.en: with arrangement of fluid-spraying nozzles (supply of fluid to the nozzles E21C0035220000)
Means for fixing picks or holders
using bolts as main fixing elements
using sleeves, rings or the like, as main fixing elements
General features of equipment for removal of chippings, e.g. for loading on conveyor

title.ko: 먼지의 발생 방지 또는 제거(유체 분사(噴射) 노즐이 결합된 픽(pick) E21C 35/187; 갱정(坑井, 시추공), 세정(洗淨)을 위한 장치 또는 방법 E21B 21/00)
title.en: Equipment for preventing the formation of, or for removal of, dust (picks with arrangement of fluid-spraying nozzles E21C0035187000;methods or apparatus for flushing boreholes E21B0021000000)
Distribution of spraying-fluids in rotating cutter-heads

title.ko: 광물의 절단 또는 완전하게 분리하기 위한 기계에 특히 적합한 원격 제어 (제어 일반 G05)
title.en: Remote control specially adapted for machines for slitting or completely freeing the mineral (control in general G05)

title.ko: 적재(積載) 장치의 유무에 따른 파내기의 다른 방법 또는 장치(슬릿 속에 삽입하여 파쇄(破碎)하는 것 E21C 27/14)
title.en: Other methods or devices for dislodging with or without loading (breaking-down by means inserted in slits E21C0027140000)
by wedges
by devices with parts pressed mechanically against the wall of a borehole

title.ko: 시추공에 수압 또는 공기압을 가하는 방법을 사용한 것
title.en: by making use of hydraulic or pneumatic pressure in a borehole
Devices with pistons, plungers, or the like pressed locally against the wall of the borehole
Devices with expanding elastic casings

title.ko: 최초에 고압(高壓)으로 또는 연속하여 고압 (高壓)을 받는 액체를 시추공 속에 분사함에 의한 것, 예. 맥동(脈動)에 의한 것, 카트리지 (cartridge)의 팽창에 의한 것(물의 분사(噴射)에 의한 슬릿 E21C 25/60; 화약(火藥)에 의한 폭약(爆藥) F42D)
title.en: by injecting into the borehole a liquid, either initially at high pressure or subsequently subjected to high pressure, e.g. by pulses, by explosive cartridges acting on the liquid (slitting by jets of water E21C0025600000;blasting by explosives F42D)
by compressed air; by gas blast; by gasifying liquids

title.ko: 열효과에 기초한 불길에 의한 것과 유사 방법에 의한 것(열을 사용한 굴착(掘鑿) E21B 7/14)
title.en: by fire-setting or by similar methods based on a heat effect (drilling by use of heat E21B0007140000)
by electricity
by ultrasonic waves

title.ko: 광물의 파내기에 특별히 사용되는 수동(手動) 공구 또는 반자동(半自動) 공구(손에 의해서만 사용되는 슬릿 기기 E21C 25/64)
title.en: Hand tools or hand-held power-operated tools specially adapted for dislodging minerals (slitting machines guided solely by hand E21C0025640000)

title.ko: 픽(pick) 해머(공기 해머 일반 B25D; 타격식(打擊式) 굴착(掘鑿) E21B 1/00)
title.en: Pick hammers (pneumatic hammers in general B25D;percussion drilling E21B0001000000)
Chisels or other cutting tools not mentioned before
Devices for testing in situ the hardness or other properties of minerals, e.g. for giving information as to the selection of suitable mining tools

title.ko: 지하 또는 지표 채광법(採鑛法)(E21C 45/00 이 우선); 그를 위한 설계 (이탄용(泥炭用) E21C 49/00)
title.en: Methods of mining or quarrying; Open-pit mining; Layouts therefor

title.ko: 지하 또는 지표 채광법(採鑛法)(E21C 45/00 이 우선); 그를 위한 설계 (이탄용(泥炭用) E21C 49/00)
title.en: Methods of underground or surface mining (E21C0045000000 takes precedence); Layouts therefor (for peat E21C0049000000)

title.ko: 지하 채광법(採鑛法)(그를 위한 채굴(採掘) 기계 E21C 25/00 ～ 39/00); 그를 위한 설계
title.en: Methods of underground mining (winning machines therefor E21C0025000000-E21C0039000000); Layouts therefor
for brown or hard coal
for rock salt or potash salt
for ores, e.g. mining placers
for oil-bearing deposits

title.ko: 지표 채광법(採鑛法)(노천굴(露天掘) 광산의 채탄(採炭) 기계 또는 광석(鑛石)의 운반용 기계 47/00); 그를 위한 설계
title.en: Methods of surface mining (machines for obtaining, or the removal of, materials in open-pit mines E21C0047000000); Layouts therefor
for brown or hard coal
for ores, e.g. mining placers

title.ko: 지표 채광 지역의 개척(開拓)(농업 목적을 위한 흙의 처리 또는 작업용 기계 또는 방법 A01B77/00, 79/00; 뒤채움용 기계 E02F 5/22)
title.en: Reclamation of surface-mined areas (machines or methods for treating or working soil for agricultural purposes A01B0077000000, A01B0079000000;machines for back-filling E02F0005220000)

title.ko: 수력 채광법(採鑛法); 수력 모니터(monitor)(E21C 25/60이 우선)
title.en: Methods of hydraulic mining; Hydraulic monitors (E21C0025600000 takes precedence)
Means for generating pulsating fluid jets
by use of highly pressurised liquid
by use of compressed gases
Automatic or remote control of hydraulic monitors

title.ko: 노천굴(露天掘) 광산의 채탄(採炭) 기계 또는 광석(鑛石)의 운반용 기계(이탄(泥炭)의 채취(採取) E21C 49/00)
title.en: Machines for obtaining, or the removal of, materials in open-pit mines (obtaining peat E21C0049000000)

title.ko: 석탄(石炭), 갈탄(褐炭) 또는 유사물용 (굴착기 (掘鑿機) 또는 토사 이송 기계 그 자체 E02F)
title.en: for coal, brown coal, or the like (dredgers or soil-shifting machines in general E02F)
Conveyor bridges used in co-operation with the winning apparatus

title.ko: 채취(採取) 장치와 공동으로 사용되는 케이블웨이(cableway)식 콘베이어(지하 견인(牽引) E21F 13/00)
title.en: Cableway conveyors used in co-operation with the winning apparatus (underground hauling E21F0013000000)
Devices for cutting-out partings, e.g. layers of sand between seams of coal
for quarrying stone, sand, gravel, or clay

title.ko: 이탄(泥炭)의 채취(採取); 그를 위한 기계(이탄(泥炭)의 처리(處理) C10F)
title.en: Obtaining peat; Machines therefor (treating peat C10F)
by excavating
by digging in the form of peat sods

title.ko: 달리 분류되지 않는 수중(水中)으로부터 광물의 채취(흡입식(吸入式) 준설기(浚渫機) 또는 그의 구성 부품 E02F 3/88; 굴착물(掘鑿物)의 이송 또는 분리를 위한 장치 E02F 7/00; 디퍼(dipper) G01N 1/12)
title.en: Obtaining minerals from underwater, not otherwise provided for (suction dredgers or component parts thereof E02F0003880000;equipment for conveying or separating excavated material E02F0007000000;dippers G01N0001120000)

title.ko: 선박의 운동에 의한 것 (특별한 목적을 위해 적합한 선박 또는 부유(浮游) 구조물 B63B 35/00)
title.en: dependent on the ship movements (vessels or floating structures adapted for special purposes B63B0035000000)

title.ko: 지구 대기권 밖으로부터 자원을 얻는 장치 또는 방법(우주 항행(航行) B64G)
title.en: Apparatus for, or methods of, winning materials from extraterrestrial sources (cosmonautics B64G)
